title: HOOD: Robinhood Markets Inc - Stock Price, Quote and News
text: Comprehensive stock information and news summary for Robinhood Markets (HOOD) from CNBC. Company Overview: Robinhood Markets Inc operates a discount brokerage platform for retail investors. Headquarters in Menlo Park, California. Public since 2023 IPO at approximately $38 per share. Stock Performance Summary: 52-week range from approximately $45 to $155 (pre-2026 peak). YTD 2026 performance down 32% despite strong 2024-2025 period. 1-year performance still positive at 50%+ after recent pullback. Recent News Developments: Q1 2026 earnings miss triggered 13% selloff on April 28. April operating metrics announcement sparked recovery rally of 5%+. Analyst price target revisions ongoing post-Q1 miss. SEC ruling on Pattern Day Trader rule change major positive catalyst. Business Highlights: Record customer base exceeding 25M funded accounts. Gold subscriptions at record 4.3M, up 36% year-over-year. Platform assets exceeded $345B in April. Net deposits momentum strong at multi-billion per quarter. Product Portfolio: Core equity trading platform. Options and futures trading. Cryptocurrency trading and wallet services. Prediction markets (new growth area). Robinhood Gold subscription service. Robinhood Cash management tools. Earnings Next: Q2 2026 earnings expected late July 2026. Key focus on trading volumes post-PDT rule change.
